title: T-018 — UI: Maintenance Dashboard (MNT-001..006 KPIs, prototype parity, MNT §10.1)
prompt:
# T-018 — Maintenance Dashboard page UI

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.1 (6 P1 dashboards MNT-001..006), §10.3 cross-ref
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:65-200 (dashboard region)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/maintenance/dashboard.jsx:1-257 (maintenance_dashboard)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component page `/maintenance` rendering 6 P1 dashboards inline + KPI grid + Today's MWO + PM compliance strip + Critical alerts + Active LOTO panel + MTBF sparkline (consumer of 15-OEE oee_shift_metrics).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/page.tsx` (RSC) calls parallel Drizzle queries: MWO counts by state, PM next-due, calibration overdue counts, spare reorder count, oee_shift_metrics MTBF (cross-module read; if 15-OEE table absent, render placeholder with empty-state banner per UI parity policy).
2. Client component `dashboard-client.tsx` wraps SWR with refreshInterval 30000 ms (matches prototype Auto-refresh 30s comment).
3. RBAC: Manager-only "Create MWO" / "Add Asset" / Onboarding card buttons; Operator-only visible KPIs read-only.
4. Empty/loading/error/permission states for each card per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
5. Use shadcn primitives only (Card, Badge, Table, Alert, Button) — no raw `<select>`, no Radix imports outside `packages/ui`.
6. i18n keys from `apps/web/messages/maintenance.{pl,en}.json` (T-013) under `maintenance.dashboard.*`.

## Prototype parity
Verify all of these by RTL snapshot + structured parity checklist:
- 8-KPI grid layout per prototype `kpi-grid-8` CSS — 4 cols on md, 8 on xl
- Today's MWO table with priority+state badge columns
- PM compliance strip (overdue count, due count, nearest-due table)
- Critical alerts dismissible row with severity badges
- Active LOTO panel (real-time SSE/polling indicator)
- MTBF sparkline (Recharts BarChart in client component, data from oee_shift_metrics)
- Onboarding card (Manager-only, RBAC server-side; step completion computed from DB state per translation notes §dashboard.jsx)
- Cross-module bridge section (read-only: delayed production_wos, blocked quality_ccps) — placeholder if those tables absent

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/dashboard-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/kpi-grid.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/mtbf-sparkline.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/__tests__/dashboard-client.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/maintenance/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/maintenance/dashboard.jsx:1-257, then it has the same 8-KPI grid + Today's MWO + PM compliance + Critical alerts + Active LOTO + MTBF sparkline + Cross-module bridge in same layout — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given SWR refreshInterval=30000 has been mounted 31s, when network log inspected, then `/api/maintenance/dashboard` polled at ~30s.
3. Given caller has no `mnt.mwo.request` perm, when page renders, then "Submit Work Request" button is hidden (RBAC server-side via Server Component).
4. Given oee_shift_metrics has no rows for the org, when page renders, then MTBF sparkline shows empty-state with "No OEE data yet — sourced from 15-OEE" per UI parity empty-state policy.
5. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then Playwright trace/artifacts demonstrating the dashboard interactive elements are attached per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity checklist + 30s SWR + RBAC + empty-state. Plus Playwright e2e capturing trace.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/_components/__tests__/dashboard-client.test.tsx`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/Playwright artifacts in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-maintenance.md` §Cross-Cutting Patterns.
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (Foundation ESLint rule).
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not introduce websocket dependency — SSE acceptable for Active LOTO (deferred to T-025), polling acceptable on dashboard.
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side — never trust client session for permission gates.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states (UI parity policy mandates all four).

pipeline_inputs.description: RSC + SWR client dashboard with 8-KPI grid + Today's MWO + PM compliance + Critical alerts + Active LOTO + MTBF sparkline. 1:1 parity with prototype dashboard.jsx.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist: 8-KPI grid (kpi-grid-8), Today's MWO table, PM compliance strip, Critical alerts dismissible, Active LOTO panel, MTBF sparkline (Recharts), Onboarding manager-only card, Cross-module bridge.

UI closeout includes screenshot/Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. If Playwright unavailable, RTL snapshot + manual blocker note acceptable.

Given SWR refreshInterval=30000 has been mounted 31s, when network log inspected, then /api/maintenance/dashboard polled at ~30s; given caller has no mnt.mwo.request perm, then Submit Work Request button is hidden (RBAC server-side)
Given oee_shift_metrics has no rows for the org, when page renders, then MTBF sparkline shows empty-state with 'No OEE data yet — sourced from 15-OEE'
Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then Playwright trace/artifacts are attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

Capture Playwright trace/video/screenshots; attach paths in closeout
